dashboard.label: AI RBA - Detection Health
dashboard.description: Operational health monitoring for AI RBA detection pack searches, runtimes, and data model status.

search.query: | rest /services/saved/searches splunk_server=local | where match(title, "AI RBA -") | eval last_run=strftime(strptime(updated, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S"), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval status=if(disabled=0, "Enabled", "Disabled") | eval schedule=cron_schedule | table title, status, schedule, last_run, dispatch.earliest_time, dispatch.latest_time | rename title as "Detection", status as "Status", schedule as "Cron Schedule", last_run as "Last Updated", dispatch.earliest_time as "Earliest Time", dispatch.latest_time as "Latest Time" | sort Detection
index=_internal sourcetype=scheduler status="failed" savedsearch_name="AI RBA -*" | timechart span=1h count by savedsearch_name

| rest /services/admin/summarization splunk_server=local | where match(title, "tstats:DM_Web|tstats:DM_Endpoint_Processes|tstats:DM_Network_Traffic|tstats:DM_Network_Resolution|tstats:DM_Data_Loss_Prevention") | eval size_mb=round(summary.size/1024/1024, 2) | eval complete_pct=round(summary.complete*100, 1)."%" | eval last_updated=strftime(summary.latest_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval status=case(summary.complete>=0.9, "Healthy", summary.complete>=0.5, "Building", true(), "Incomplete") | table title, status, complete_pct, size_mb, last_updated | rename title as "Data Model", status as "Status", complete_pct as "Complete", size_mb as "Size (MB)", last_updated as "Last Updated"
index=_internal sourcetype=scheduler savedsearch_name="AI RBA -*" | eval runtime=round(run_time, 2) | timechart span=1h avg(runtime) as avg_runtime max(runtime) as max_runtime by savedsearch_name

index=_internal sourcetype=scheduler savedsearch_name="AI RBA -*" | stats avg(run_time) as avg_runtime max(run_time) as max_runtime count as executions by savedsearch_name | eval avg_runtime=round(avg_runtime, 2), max_runtime=round(max_runtime, 2) | sort - avg_runtime | rename savedsearch_name as "Detection", avg_runtime as "Avg Runtime (s)", max_runtime as "Max Runtime (s)", executions as "Executions"
